works.title: Circle of Emotions
works.subtitle: A multidisciplinary journey into the human inner side, combining live music, surround electronics, video art, visual art, and audience participation.
works.description: The performance is site specific and can be tailored for the venue

credits.Performers: Naama Lavee / Jason Butler / Andy Ingamells

works.title: Machina Craft
works.subtitle: An installation of live electronic improvisation within a workshop for instrument repair.
works.description: Sonata in iii movements for Electronics, Craftsman and his Tools

works.title: The Clown March
works.subtitle: A musical piece in 5 acts for an Ensemble and actors.
works.description: A performance that takes place in a public space, portraying a funeral ceremony from a clown's perspective.

credits.Performers: Andy Ingamells, Deirdre Cadogan, Sidney Uzik, Stephan Keenan, Maxine Oneill, Lotta Vainionpaa

works.title: Marionette
works.subtitle: A theatrical-circus-musical performance
works.description: A Marionette who escapes her home in search of her name and her humanity

credits.Collaborators:
Text and theatrical direction - Dalit Milshtein
Costumes - Michal Laor / Light design - Judy Kupferman

works.title: Irish pub
works.subtitle: A short musical composition bout the lively culture of Irish pubs

works.title: Porridge
works.subtitle: A joyful Avant-Garde composition about the enjoyment of cooking

works.title: War zone
works.subtitle: Two compositions that faced the complicity of war

works.title: Serious Girl
works.subtitle: A serious electronic improvisation about a very serious girl

credits.Collaborators: Sidney Uzik / Jason Butler / Tara Malone
Eran Lavee / Yael Gat / Daniele Pellegrini

works.title: Berceuse Ensemble
works.subtitle: An international ensemble presenting a new program of light classical music as part of a diverse and friendly repertoire.
works.description: During the concert we provide fascinating facts and interesting anecdotes alongside well known classical music, original arrangements and original compositions.

works.title: TNEEL
works.subtitle: Work in progress operetta based on poems by the poet Edward Lear. Combining classical and contemporary music with electronic elements.
